notifications.title: 🔁 Restart (manual) — Apr 8, 06:26 PM
notifications.text:
Restart complete — Prometheus is back up, and Telegram polling should be resumed after the quick manual restart request. No files changed in this restart; this looks like a straight gateway/process reboot rather than a code update.

What do you want me to verify next: Telegram message intake, outbound replies, or the broader gateway health?
